title: Sales Manager Vacancy at InfraMantra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at InfraMantra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
